name: SPM99
body:
### Welcome to the SPM99 ongoing maintenance page.
SPM99 is not maintained by its original authors anymore. This project attempts to maintain SPM99 sources so that they keep working with newer versions of Matlab.
[SPM99 Web Site](http://sourceforge.net/projects/spm99/)
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
